title: Labour could lose 'well over' 1,000 seats in crunch May elections
description: Labour is defending more than half of the 5,000 council seats up for grabs across England in 136 councils on May 7 in the PM's biggest electoral test since the general election

title: EU voices concern over reports of violence during Serbia elections, urges action
description: The European Union has expressed concern over violence during local elections in Serbia on the weekend. It also called on autocratic President Aleksandar Vucic’s authorities to punish the attackers. Serbia is a candidate nation for membership in the 27-nation bloc.
